entries.summary: Initial Western sanctions targeted Russian banks after Putin recognised Donetsk and Luhansk.
US imposed full blocking sanctions on four Russian banks and tech export bans.
UK unveiled its largest-ever sanctions package targeting major Russian banks and oligarchs.
EU banned selected Russian banks from SWIFT and froze central bank deposits.
US imposed full ban on Russian crude oil, liquefied gas, and coal imports.
Biden administration prohibited new US investment in Russia in fresh sanction package.
EU's fifth round banned Russian coal, lumber, cement, seafood, and fertilisers.
Putin declared the West's sanctions blitz had failed to crash the Russian economy.
EU adopted sixth package banning seaborne Russian oil and petroleum products imports.
Sixth round of EU sanctions formally approved, including phased Russian oil ban.
Putin dismissed Western sanctions as a stupid blitzkrieg destined to backfire on Europe.
Russia defaulted on its sovereign foreign debt for the first time since 1918.
G7 and EU price cap on Russian seaborne crude oil took effect.
US, EU, UK officials visited UAE to discuss enforcement of Russia sanctions.
EU approved 13th sanctions package over Ukraine war on second anniversary.
US announced sanctions on over 500 Russia-linked targets ahead of war anniversary.
US sanctioned hundreds more individuals and firms over Russia's continuing war.
Biden announced first tranche of sanctions targeting Russian banks and sovereign debt.
Biden unveiled sweeping sanctions on Russian banks and elites after full invasion.
EU, UK, Canada, Australia, Japan rolled out coordinated penalties on Russian targets.
US, allies expanded sanctions to dozens of Russian and Belarusian elites and entities.
Biden banned all Russian oil, liquefied natural gas, and coal imports to US.
Sanctions sent the rouble into freefall; Russian central bank doubled interest rates.
US Treasury sanctioned Putin's adult daughters and major Russian commercial banks.
US barred American consulting and media firms from providing services to Russia.
Analysts said sanctions' economic pain on Russia had been slower than expected.
US imposed new sanctions in response to Russia's annexation of four Ukrainian regions.
G7 price cap on seaborne Russian oil at $60 per barrel took effect.
Treasury unveiled fresh sanctions on Russia's metals and mining sector on anniversary.
Analysis found Russia's economy proved resilient despite two years of Western sanctions.
Biden imposed sanctions on more than 500 targets after Navalny's death in custody.
US sanctioned nearly 400 entities and individuals tied to Russia's war effort.
US sanctioned Gazprombank, Russia's largest remaining non-designated bank, plus 50 lenders.
